content.title: Type 'TransactionMapping' failed to compile
content.message:
The node type 'FutuRe/EuropeRe/TransactionMapping' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Compilation failed: Compilation failed for 'FutuRe/EuropeRe/TransactionMapping':
CS0246 Error (line 58): The type or namespace name 'TransactionMapping' could not be found (are you missing a using directive or an assembly reference?)
CS1591 Warning (line 32): Missing XML comment for publicly visible type or member 'FutuRe_EuropeRe_TransactionMappingMeshNodeProviderAttribute'
